title: podman-remote pull: SEGV
body:
Window 1:
```
# podman varlink --timeout=0 unix:/run/podman/io.podman
```
Window 2:
```
$ sudo ./bin/podman-remote pull alpine                                                                                                                -
ERRO[0000] Could not find flag trace
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x0 pc=0x1243e41]

goroutine 1 [running]:
main.pullCmd(0x2547400, 0x0, 0x0)

main.glob..func37(0x24e0d60, 0xc0001a79b0, 0x1, 0x1, 0x0, 0x0)

github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x24e0d60, 0xc0000bc080, 0x1, 0x1, 0x24e0d60, 0xc0000bc080)
        /home/esm/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:762 +0x473

github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(0x24e3360, 0xc0006d4370, 0xc0000ae058)

main.main()
        /home/esm/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/main.go:149 +0x3c
```
